hero.title: The Aegean's Golden Gift, Brought to Life at Your Table.
hero.text: Cold-pressed extra virgin olive oils, carefully crafted with traditional methods from centuries-old trees ripened by the winds of Pelitköy. The purest, freshest spirit of the harvest.

coldPress.title: Cold Pressed
coldPress.text: Traditional integrity: Natural pressing fully preserves nutritional value.

earlyHarvest.title: Early Harvest
earlyHarvest.text: Youthful energy: The vivid aroma and polyphenol richness of fresh green harvest.

natural.title: Natural
natural.text: Additive-free purity: 100% natural, with no preservatives or chemicals.

local.title: Local
local.text: An ancestral legacy: Authentic, local production from our own family groves.

collection.title: Our Collection
collection.text: Discover the unique flavors of Pelitköy's harvest seasons.

collectionPage.title: Our Collection
collectionPage.heroText: Discover our natural extra virgin olive oils, reaching your table from the fertile lands of Pelitköy.
collectionPage.text: Meet our olive oils, carefully crafted from early harvest to cold press.
collectionPage.metaDescription: The Veroliva olive oil collection: early harvest, cold-pressed classics and family-size options.

guidePage.metaTitle: Olive Oil Guide | Veroliva Olive Oil
guidePage.metaDescription: Olive oil varieties, benefits and usage tips. The Veroliva guide to choosing the right olive oil.

hero.title: Olive Oil Guide
hero.text: Get to know olive oil more closely. Make the right choice and discover the difference in taste and health.

about.title: About Olive Oil
about.text: With a history spanning thousands of years, olive oil is one of the most treasured legacies of Mediterranean culture. Its natural production process, nutritious content and unique aroma make it indispensable at our tables.
about.f1Text: Made from 100% natural olives with no additives.
about.f2Text: Rich in vitamin E and antioxidants.
about.f3Text: A natural part of a balanced diet.

varieties.title: Olive Oil Varieties
varieties.text: Choose the olive oil that best suits your needs and your palate.
varieties.v1Text: Produced early in the season from green olives. Intense aroma, high in polyphenols.
varieties.v2Text: Obtained from ripe olives. Balanced aroma with a smooth finish.
varieties.v3Text: First cold press, in its purest form. The highest quality olive oil.

tips.title: Olive Oil Usage Tips
tips.text: Use olive oil the right way to enhance its flavor and benefits.
tips.t1Text: Adds flavor and health to your fresh salads.
tips.t2Text: Ideal for medium-heat cooking and sautéing.
tips.t3Text: Pairs perfectly with bread, cheese and olives.
tips.t4Text: Adds a distinctive touch to desserts with the right recipes.

story.title: Traditional Mastery Since 1985
story.text: A story of three generations of patience and love: For us, every tree is a legacy and every harvest a celebration. We blend traditional mastery with nature's patience.

guide.title: Olive Oil Guide
guide.text: Everything you want to know about olive oil, plus recipe ideas.
